policy.battle_boundary: No battle or promotion opens from cut source-lane expansion alone.
policy.cut_boundary: Expanded cuts are source-lane evidence, not deck changes.
policy.protected_role_boundary: Lands, commander payoffs, spot interaction, and attack-window protection stay protected while below target or strategically required.
policy.staple_boundary: Structural staples require same-lane replacement or battle proof before cutting.

selected_value_safe_cuts.card_name: Fable of the Mirror-Breaker // Reflection of Kiki-Jiki

stage_only_cut_candidates.card_name: Birgi, God of Storytelling // Harnfel, Horn of Bounty
